# diff

Diff snapshot or screenshot

## Usage

```bash
agent-device diff snapshot | diff screenshot --baseline <path> [--out <diff.png>] [--threshold <0-1>]
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- `snapshot --diff` routes to `diff snapshot`.

## Allowed Flags

- `-i`: Snapshot: interactive elements only
- `-c`: Snapshot: compact output (drop empty structure)
- `--depth, -d <depth>`: Snapshot: limit snapshot depth
- `--scope, -s <scope>`: Snapshot: scope snapshot to label/identifier
- `--raw`: Snapshot: raw node output
- `--baseline, -b <path>`: Diff screenshot: path to baseline image file
- `--threshold <0-1>`: Diff screenshot: color distance threshold (default 0.1)
- `--out <path>`: Output path

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
